description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:18 Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines variables CONTAINER_IMAGE_RELEASE_HEROKU, CONTAINER_IMAGE_RELEASE_LATEST, CONTAINER_IMAGE_RELEASE_REF, CONTAINER_IMAGE_TEST, and PRIMARY_NAMESPACE. Add a build stage containing a build job that runs the global before_script (docker version and docker login to registry.gitlab.com with $CI_BUILD_TOKEN), then executes `docker pull $CONTAINER_IMAGE_RELEASE_LATEST || true`, `docker build --cache-from $CONTAINER_IMAGE_RELEASE_LATEST -t $CONTAINER_IMAGE_TEST .`, and `docker push $CONTAINER_IMAGE_TEST`. Add a release stage with a release job that is limited to the master branch and only when $CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE equals $PRIMARY_NAMESPACE. The release job runs `docker login --username=_ --password=$HEROKU_API_KEY registry.heroku.com`, pulls the test image, retags it to $CONTAINER_IMAGE_RELEASE_LATEST, $CONTAINER_IMAGE_RELEASE_REF, and $CONTAINER_IMAGE_RELEASE_HEROKU, pushes each tag, installs nodejs, yarn and the Heroku CLI via `apk update && apk add nodejs yarn && yarn global add heroku@7.0.95`, authenticates with `heroku auth:whoami`, enables the runtime-new-layer-extract lab for the app ttn-experiments, and finally releases the container to Heroku with `heroku container:release --app=ttn-experiments worker`. No caches or artifacts are defined.
